chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr.B.A. No.S-335 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on urgent application M.A. No. 3740/2023 2. For orders on office objection 3. For orders on exemption application M.A. No. 3741/2023 4. For hearing of main case 12.04.2023. Mr. Mola Bux Ayoob Laghari advocate for applicant along with applicant. -.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2. Deferred for the time being. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 4. It is stated that applicant is innocent but has been falsely implicated in this case out of enmity; that the applicant wants to surrender before the trial court but needs protection as he apprehends his arrest on account of issuance of NBWs against him. Without touching the merits of the case, the applicant is granted protective bail for 07 days from today subject to furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- and PR Bond of the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. NBWs issued against the applicant shall remain suspended during the aforesaid period. This order shall cease to have its effect on expiry of 07 days on 18.04.2023 or on surrender of the applicant before the concerned Court, whichever is earlier. Bail application stands disposed of. JUDGE Ali Haider
